---
title: "Medusa: Mendelian Randomization Analysis Report"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
params:
  mrEstimate: NULL
  sensitivityResults: NULL
  diagnosticResults: NULL
  combinedProfile: NULL
  siteProfileList: NULL
  instrumentTable: NULL
  exposureLabel: "Exposure"
  outcomeLabel: "Outcome"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6
)
library(ggplot2)
library(Medusa)
```

# Executive Summary

```{r executive-summary, results='asis'}
est <- params$mrEstimate

if (!is.null(est)) {
  direction <- if (est$betaMR > 0) "increased" else "decreased"
  significance <- if (est$pValue < 0.001) {
    "strong statistical evidence"
  } else if (est$pValue < 0.05) {
    "moderate statistical evidence"
  } else {
    "insufficient statistical evidence"
  }

  # Assess sensitivity concordance
  strength <- "inconclusive"
  if (!is.null(params$sensitivityResults$summary)) {
    nMethods <- nrow(params$sensitivityResults$summary)
    nAgreeing <- sum(sign(params$sensitivityResults$summary$beta_MR) == sign(est$betaMR), na.rm = TRUE)
    nSignificant <- sum(params$sensitivityResults$summary$pval < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (nSignificant >= 3 && nAgreeing == nMethods) {
      strength <- "strong"
    } else if (nSignificant >= 2 && nAgreeing >= nMethods - 1) {
      strength <- "moderate"
    } else if (nSignificant >= 1) {
      strength <- "weak"
    }
  }

  cat(sprintf(
    "This analysis assessed whether genetically proxied **%s** is causally associated with **%s** using Mendelian Randomization.\n\n",
    params$exposureLabel, params$outcomeLabel
  ))

  cat(sprintf(
    "**Main finding**: There is %s that %s is associated with %s risk of %s (OR = %.2f, 95%% CI: %.2f--%.2f, p = %.2e).\n\n",
    significance, params$exposureLabel, direction, params$outcomeLabel,
    est$oddsRatio, est$orCiLower, est$orCiUpper, est$pValue
  ))

  cat(sprintf("**Strength of evidence**: %s (based on sensitivity analysis concordance).\n\n", toupper(strength)))
  cat(sprintf("**Sites pooled**: %d | **Total cases**: %d | **Total controls**: %d | **Instruments**: %d\n",
              params$combinedProfile$nSites,
              params$combinedProfile$totalCases,
              params$combinedProfile$totalControls,
              est$nInstruments))
}
```

# Instrument Summary

```{r instrument-table}
if (!is.null(params$instrumentTable)) {
  instTab <- params$instrumentTable
  displayCols <- intersect(
    c("snp_id", "effect_allele", "other_allele", "beta_ZX", "se_ZX",
      "pval_ZX", "eaf", "gene_region", "fStatistic", "strandAmbiguous"),
    names(instTab)
  )
  knitr::kable(
    instTab[, displayCols],
    digits = 4,
    caption = "Genetic instruments used in the analysis"
  )
}
```

# Likelihood Profile

```{r likelihood-profile, fig.cap="Profile log-likelihood curves. Light blue: individual sites. Dark blue: combined profile. Dashed vertical line: MLE. Dotted horizontal line: CI threshold."}
if (!is.null(params$combinedProfile)) {
  plotLikelihoodProfile(
    combinedProfile = params$combinedProfile,
    siteProfileList = params$siteProfileList,
    mrEstimate = params$mrEstimate,
    title = sprintf("Profile Log-Likelihood: %s on %s",
                    params$exposureLabel, params$outcomeLabel)
  )
}
```

# Main MR Result

```{r main-result, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(est)) {
  resultTable <- data.frame(
    Metric = c("beta_ZY (SNP-outcome)", "SE(beta_ZY)",
               "beta_MR (causal estimate)", "SE(beta_MR)",
               "95% CI lower", "95% CI upper", "P-value",
               "Odds ratio", "OR 95% CI lower", "OR 95% CI upper"),
    Value = c(
      sprintf("%.4f", est$betaZY),
      sprintf("%.4f", est$seZY),
      sprintf("%.4f", est$betaMR),
      sprintf("%.4f", est$seMR),
      sprintf("%.4f", est$ciLower),
      sprintf("%.4f", est$ciUpper),
      sprintf("%.2e", est$pValue),
      sprintf("%.3f", est$oddsRatio),
      sprintf("%.3f", est$orCiLower),
      sprintf("%.3f", est$orCiUpper)
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  knitr::kable(resultTable, caption = "Primary MR estimate")
}
```

# Sensitivity Analyses

```{r sensitivity-table}
if (!is.null(params$sensitivityResults$summary) &&
    nrow(params$sensitivityResults$summary) > 0) {
  knitr::kable(
    params$sensitivityResults$summary,
    digits = 4,
    caption = "Sensitivity analysis comparison"
  )
}
```

```{r sensitivity-forest, fig.cap="Forest plot comparing MR estimation methods."}
if (!is.null(params$sensitivityResults)) {
  plotSensitivityForest(params$sensitivityResults)
}
```

```{r egger-intercept, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(params$sensitivityResults$mrEgger)) {
  egger <- params$sensitivityResults$mrEgger
  cat(sprintf(
    "\n**MR-Egger intercept**: %.4f (SE = %.4f, p = %.4f). %s\n",
    egger$intercept, egger$intercept_se, egger$intercept_pval,
    if (egger$intercept_pval < 0.05) "Evidence for directional pleiotropy." else "No evidence for directional pleiotropy."
  ))
}
```

## Leave-One-Out Analysis

```{r leave-one-out, fig.cap="Leave-one-out analysis: IVW estimate after removing each SNP."}
if (!is.null(params$sensitivityResults$leaveOneOut)) {
  loo <- params$sensitivityResults$leaveOneOut
  loo$snp_removed <- factor(loo$snp_removed, levels = rev(loo$snp_removed))

  ggplot2::ggplot(loo, ggplot2::aes(
    x = beta_MR, y = snp_removed,
    xmin = beta_MR - 1.96 * se_MR,
    xmax = beta_MR + 1.96 * se_MR
  )) +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    ggplot2::geom_errorbarh(height = 0.2) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(size = 2) +
    ggplot2::labs(title = "Leave-One-Out Analysis",
                  x = expression(beta[MR]), y = "SNP removed") +
    mrTheme()
}
```

# Instrument Diagnostics

```{r diagnostics-flags, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(params$diagnosticResults)) {
  flags <- params$diagnosticResults$diagnosticFlags
  if (any(flags)) {
    cat("**Diagnostic warnings:**\n\n")
    if (flags["weakInstruments"]) cat("- Weak instruments detected (F < 10)\n")
    if (flags["phewasSignificant"]) cat("- PheWAS found significant pleiotropic associations\n")
    if (flags["negativeControlFailure"]) cat("- Negative control outcomes showed significant associations\n")
    if (flags["alleleFreqDiscrepancy"]) cat("- Allele frequency discrepancies detected\n")
    if (flags["highMissingness"]) cat("- High genotype missingness for some SNPs\n")
  } else {
    cat("All instrument diagnostics passed.\n")
  }
}
```

```{r phewas-plot, fig.cap="Instrument PheWAS: SNP associations across OMOP covariate domains. Red line: Bonferroni threshold."}
if (!is.null(params$diagnosticResults$phewasResults) &&
    nrow(params$diagnosticResults$phewasResults) > 0) {
  phewas <- params$diagnosticResults$phewasResults
  phewas$neglogp <- -log10(phewas$pval)
  bonferroni <- -log10(0.05 / nrow(phewas))

  ggplot2::ggplot(phewas, ggplot2::aes(
    x = seq_len(nrow(phewas)), y = neglogp
  )) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(ggplot2::aes(color = significant), size = 1.5) +
    ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = bonferroni, color = "red",
                         linetype = "dashed") +
    ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "grey60", "TRUE" = "red")) +
    ggplot2::labs(title = "Instrument PheWAS",
                  x = "Covariate index", y = "-log10(p-value)") +
    mrTheme() +
    ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "none")
}
```

# Site Contributions

```{r site-table}
if (!is.null(params$combinedProfile$siteContributions)) {
  knitr::kable(
    params$combinedProfile$siteContributions,
    caption = "Per-site summary"
  )
}
```

# Methods

```{r methods-text, results='asis'}
cat(sprintf(
"## Auto-generated Methods Text

Two-sample Mendelian Randomization was performed using the Medusa R package.
Genetic instruments for %s were obtained from published GWAS summary statistics
(%d independent SNPs at genome-wide significance, p < 5e-8, after LD clumping
at r-squared < 0.001 within 10,000 kb windows using a European reference panel).

The outcome (%s) was ascertained from OMOP Common Data Model electronic health
record data across %d federated sites. Each site fit the Medusa outcome model:
a binary outcome regression with a configurable backend (`glm` or Cyclops)
and user-supplied covariates, then evaluated the profile log-likelihood across
a grid of SNP-outcome association values.

Site-level profile log-likelihood vectors were pooled at a central coordinator
via pointwise summation (equivalent to multiplying likelihoods under inter-site
independence). No individual-level data left any site.

The causal log-effect was estimated via the Wald ratio with uncertainty from
the pooled profile and the delta method; for binary outcomes, exponentiating
this estimate yields an odds ratio. Sensitivity analyses included the inverse
variance weighted method, MR-Egger regression, weighted median estimation,
Steiger directional filtering, and leave-one-out analysis when per-SNP
summaries were available.
",
params$exposureLabel,
ifelse(is.null(est), 0, est$nInstruments),
params$outcomeLabel,
ifelse(is.null(params$combinedProfile), 0, params$combinedProfile$nSites)
))
```

---

*Report generated by Medusa v`r utils::packageVersion("Medusa")` on `r Sys.Date()`.*
